rulePrefixes.foundation: Application bootstrap, registration, scaffolding, configuration, and AOT setup
rulePrefixes.architecture: Mapping, dependency boundaries, job queues, and command or event bus usage
rulePrefixes.contracts: Request and response models, binding, and validation-failure boundaries
rulePrefixes.pipeline: Endpoint conveniences, preprocessors, postprocessors, and execution flow
rulePrefixes.transport: Files, streaming, SSE, RPC, and HTTP boundary selection
rulePrefixes.docs: Swagger, OpenAPI metadata, and client-generation guidance
rulePrefixes.runtime: Caching, rate limiting, idempotency, and exception behavior
rulePrefixes.security: Authentication and authorization policies for endpoints
rulePrefixes.testing: Unit and integration verification for endpoints and side effects
rulePrefixes.versioning: Release groups, API versioning, and deprecation guidance
